description: Defines Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) for document-related API responses and requests in a Spring Boot application.

classes.name: DocumentDtos
classes.description: A utility class encapsulating DTO records for document API operations, including upload responses, listing items, and metadata updates.

methods.name: UploadResponse
methods.description: DTO record representing the response after uploading a document, including document ID, user ID, filename, content type, size, checksum, metadata, and creation timestamp.

methods.name: ListItem
methods.description: DTO record for representing a document item in a list, containing IDs, filename, content type, size, checksum, metadata, and creation timestamp.

methods.name: MetadataUpdateRequest
methods.description: DTO record for requesting metadata updates for a document, containing a JSON string with new metadata. Includes validation annotation to ensure it's not blank.
